# pauseOnWillResignActive

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically pauses the rendering loop when the application resigns the active state.

## Declaration

```swift
var pauseOnWillResignActive: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true]. If your application sets this to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], it must explicitly set the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewController/isPaused] property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] when the application resigns the active state.

## Controlling Frame Updates

- **isPaused**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the rendering loop is paused.
- **resumeOnDidBecomeActive**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the view controller automatically resumes the rendering loop when the application becomes active.
